content.speakerText: To wrap up: Alex will send the report by EOD, Sam will follow up with IT, and we meet again next Tuesday at 10.
content.speakerTextCn: 总结一下：Alex今天下班前发报告，Sam跟进IT，下周二10点再开。
content.explanation: 正确答案 'Got it—thanks for running this!' 是对会议总结的标准回应，表示确认并感谢主持人。其他选项要么是提出新请求（reschedule），要么是表达困惑（didn't understand），或擅自接管任务（handle myself），都不符合回应总结的语境。

content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢大家，祝你们今天愉快！

options.text: What time is the next meeting?
I need more time to finish.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You too, bye!' 是对道别祝福的自然、礼貌回应。其他选项要么是陈述事实（I'm leaving），要么是询问新信息（next meeting），或表达困难（need more time），都不符合道别场景的简洁积极原则。

content.speakerText: Let me summarize the action items: Maria will draft the proposal by Thursday, John will book the conference room, and we’ll review everything next Friday.
content.speakerTextCn: 让我总结一下任务：Maria将在周四前起草提案，John将预订会议室，我们将在下周五复盘所有内容。

options.text: Can you send me the list again? I want to make sure I didn't miss anything.
I think Maria should do it sooner.
Why are we meeting again next Friday?
I'm not responsible for any of these tasks.

content.explanation: 正确答案是请求确认任务清单，这是会议总结后常见的合理请求，体现主动性和责任感。其他选项质疑安排、质疑截止时间或推卸责任，���不符合专业会议语境。

content.template: To wrap up: Alex will send the report by ___ , Sam will follow up with IT, and we meet again next Tuesday at 10.
content.hint: 职场中表示'今天下班前'的常用缩写
content.knowledgePoint: 职场缩略语（EOD = End of Day）

content.template: Could you please ___ the action items in an email so I can keep track?
content.hint: 请求发送任务清单时的常用动词

content.template: Thanks, everyone—have a great day! — ___ too, bye!
content.hint: 回应祝福时的固定句型

content.speakerText: To wrap up: Alex will send the report by EOD, Sam will follow up with IT, and we meet again next Tuesday at 10.
content.speakerTextCn: 总结一下：Alex今天下班前发报告，Sam跟进IT，下周二10点再开。
expectedAnswers: Thanks for the summary. I'll make sure I'm ready for Tuesday.
Just to confirm: Alex sends the report, Sam contacts IT, and we meet next Tuesday at 10?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确表示理解并感谢总结
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当（如使用 'EOD' 或 'next Tuesday'）
表达自然度：符合职场口语习惯，不生硬或冗长
关键词覆盖：使用了 'action item', 'EOD', 'next Tuesday' 等场景关键词

content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢大家，祝你们今天愉快！
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：礼貌回应道别并表达积极情绪
语言准确性：使用正确句型（如 'You too' 或 'Appreciate it'）
表达自然度：简洁、符合日常职场道别习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'thanks', 'have a great day', 'bye' 等道别关键词

content.speakerText: Alright, to conclude: Sarah will update the client list by tomorrow, Tom will prepare the budget slides, and we’ll reconvene on Thursday at 2 PM.
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，总结一下：Sarah将在明天前更新客户名单，Tom将准备预算幻灯片，我们周四下午2点再会。
expectedAnswers: Got it—thanks for the clear summary!
Could you email the action items? I want to double-check my tasks.
See you Thursday! I’ll have the slides ready.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确回应总结，或提出合理请求，或确认后续安排
语言准确性：语法无误，动词时态和搭配正确
表达自然度：语气自然，符合职场会议结束语境
关键词覆盖：使用了 'action items', 'update', 'reconvene', 'Thursday' 等关键词
